title: Per-Line-Item Tax Control
excerpt:
Description
Allow tax to be enabled or disabled per line item. Many quotes require tax on materials only, while labor or services remain non-taxable. 
What are you trying to achieve
Apply tax only to specific line items …

posts.author: ashtondavanzo (ashton@adrenalinattractions.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Allow tax to be enabled or disabled per line item. Many quotes require tax on materials only, while labor or services remain non-taxable.

What are you trying to achieve

Apply tax only to specific line items while keeping non-taxable items like labor tax-free.

posts.author: bettyparker098 (betty parker)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, You should go into your Tax Settings, select “Line-specific tax,” and then manually check the tax box for your materials while leaving the labor and services boxes Verve Card unchecked. This ensures the final calculation only adds tax to the specific dollar amounts you’ve flagged as taxable.
